mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of P.L. Howard
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of P.L. Howard W.L. Howard, Administrator H.S. Howard, Adinistrator, son Peter L. Howard, Jr., son Maidie E. Howard, daughter Grover L. Howard, son Annie Amanda Bell Howard, daughter Gertrude C. Howard, daughter Ola A. Howard, daughter Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 398-401, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
